title: actinophloeus montanus
intro: Actinophloeus montanus, also known as the mountain ironwood, is a tree species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its hardwood and narrow leaf shape. The medicinal properties of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Actinophloeus montanus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and insect repellent. Actinophloeus montanus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are typically made from the bark or roots of the plant.
